findings.summary: Two blocking findings: SG-001 (no @general visual UI) and SG-002 (AtOption type missing delegate discriminant)

Key insight: subagents already appear in @mention popover (agentList filters mode!=='primary', which includes subagents). Pipeline (handleAtSelect, createPill, parseFromDOM, buildRequestParts) already works for agent parts. Only visual distinction is missing.
Two filter pipelines differ: @mention uses mode!=='primary' (includes subagents), composer dropdown uses mode!=='subagent' (excludes subagents).
Critical finding: handleAtSelect (L591) crashes on option.path for delegate types. Plan revised (r2) to include Fix E and F.
Confirmed downstream pipeline (ContentPart, buildRequestParts, createPill, parseFromDOM) is safe. Only AtOption discriminator consumers need changes.
Currently no test coverage for @mention system. Manual validation only.
